---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new UI element, test scenario, or section for the practice hub
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Summary
<!-- What would you like to see added? Keep it to one sentence. -->

## Category
- [ ] New UI element / component
- [ ] New test case (plain English)
- [ ] Improvement to an existing element
- [ ] New testing section (e.g. WebSockets, GraphQL, PWA)
- [ ] Accessibility improvement
- [ ] Playwright / Selenium specific scenario

## Problem / Motivation
<!-- Why is this useful for automation practice? What gap does it fill? -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- Describe what the element or feature should look like and how it should behave. -->

## Automation Testing Value
<!-- Explain which locator strategies or Playwright/Selenium features this would help practice. -->
<!-- e.g. "Helps practice getByRole('listbox'), keyboard navigation, and ARIA attributes." -->

## Alternatives Considered
<!-- Any other approaches or workarounds? -->

## Additional Context
<!-- Mockups, links, or examples from real web apps you'd like to replicate. -->
